paper_title: Precipitation Events and Moisture Source Analysis in Southern Ecuador

methods.description: This method involves screening local precipitation records for missing values and classifying daily precipitation amounts into three categories to analyze moisture source regions.

steps.description: Screen the local precipitation record for missing values.

steps.description: Classify daily precipitation amounts into three categories: 'no rain', 'normal rain', and 'heavy rain'.

methods.method_name: Backward Trajectory Model for Moisture Source Regions
methods.description: This method computes moisture source regions using a backward trajectory model based on ERA5 reanalysis data.

steps.description: Compute moisture source regions using a backward trajectory model based on ERA5 reanalysis data.

methods.description: This method evaluates the selected reanalysis product against local AWS data and MERRA2 to ensure confidence in the data used.

steps.description: Evaluate the selected reanalysis product against MERRA2.

methods.description: This method discusses the oxygen isotopic signatures in Bursera graveolens tree rings with respect to precipitation and identified moisture source regions.
